subcodes.first_line: Blessed be the Lord Who hath spoken and caused all things to speak, testifying that there is none other God but Him, the Single, the One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک المولی الذی نطق و انطق الاشیاء علی انه لا اله الا هو الفرد الواحد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @consolation and comfort
